description.value: Understanding a magical structure completely enough to disrupt it is one thing. Turning that disrupted energy back on the caster is the mark of a true arcane scholar.

system.benefits: When you successfully use Analytical Mind to impose Misfortune on a caster's rolls and their weave still fails (0 successes on their weaving roll), you may spend 4 Energy as a [Free] action to redirect the collapsed magical structure. Deal damage to the original caster equal to the Energy they spent on the failed weave, using the same energy type. No save.

usage.text: Triggers on enemy weave failure after Analytical Mind; costs 4 Energy
